summary: The RPONTSYD series shows a highly consistent ~0.1B value on the second Tuesday of each month. Feb 10, 2026 is the second Tuesday of Feb. 9/12 months in sample had ~0.1, 3/12 had near-zero. Jan 2026 conditions are normal.
content:
Pattern analysis of RPONTSYD (Overnight Repo Agreements: Treasury Securities Purchased by Fed):
- Data is overwhelmingly zero or near-zero (81.5% of days <= 0.01B)
- Clear "second Tuesday" pattern: ~0.1B operation on the second Tuesday of each month
- 9/12 months showed ~0.1 (range 0.100-0.104), 3/12 showed near-zero
- Jan 2026 second Tuesday (Jan 13) = 0.102, confirming pattern continues
- Oct-Dec 2025 had large spikes (up to 31.5B) due to year-end funding stress
- By Jan 5, 2026, operations returned to normal
- Feb 10, 2026 IS the second Tuesday of February
- Base rate for mid-month values > 1B (excluding Oct-Dec stress): 0.6%
